pool.baseline: The candle flickers its final, gasping breath, much like the spirit within this wretched breast. He is gone, and with him, the very sun has been extinguished from my sky. There is no warmth left in this world, only the cold, creeping shadows of a life that has become a hollow mockery. It would be so much more graceful... to simply cease. To let the darkness take me, as if I were nothing more than a petal falling into a black abyss.
